secondaryLessonTitleCollision.description: If two rows share the same pathway and lessonTitleCollisionKey(normalizeLessonTitleForCollision(title)) but different slugs, the later row is quarantined (high confidence). No merge, no overwrite.
secondaryLessonTitleCollision.normalization: NFKC lowercase; non-alphanumeric → spaces; collapse whitespace; SHA-256 first 16 hex chars of normalized string

reasonCodes.LESSON_TITLE_SLUG_COLLISION_IMPORT: Title key collision with another row in the same import run (different slug).
reasonCodes.LESSON_TITLE_SLUG_COLLISION_DB: Title key matches an existing published lesson in DB for this pathway/locale with a different slug.
reasonCodes.LESSON_DUPLICATE_SLUG_IMPORT_ROW: A later row reused pathwayId+slug already seen in this run (first row wins for insert attempt).

quarantineVsReport.lowConfidence: Not used in v1; candidates increment lessonTitleCollisionCandidates only for high-confidence paths.

counters.lessonSlugDuplicates: Rows skipped: duplicate pathwayId+slug within the same import run after the first occurrence.
counters.lessonTitleCollisionCandidates: Rows where a title-key vs slug mismatch was detected (import or DB).
counters.quarantinedLessons: Lesson rows written to quarantine log with a lesson-specific reason (includes collisions and validation failures logged there).
